arts.ttl: Merseyside derby between Everton and Liverpool called off as Storm Darragh batters UK
arts.sum: The severe weather battering the UK has seen the Premier League clash on Saturday lunchtime postponed

arts.ttl: Liverpool players are used to pressure - Slot
arts.sum: Arne Slot says his Liverpool players are used to the pressure of having to win as they seek to maintain their advantage at the top of the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool Merseyside derby postponed after Storm Darragh hits UK
arts.sum: Saturday’s Merseyside derby clash between Everton and Liverpool has been postponed four hours before kick-off due to the effects of Storm Darragh.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool: Merseyside Derby postponed due to Storm Darragh
arts.sum: The Merseyside Derby between Everton and Liverpool has been postponed due to safety concerns. Authorities have decided to call off the fixture – the final Merseyside Derby to be staged at Goodison Park – amid ‘mass disruption’ caused by Storm Darragh. The Athletic have confirmed the news, with official statements from both clubs expected imminently. […] The post Everton vs Liverpool: Merseyside Derby postponed due to Storm Darragh first appeared on The Football Faithful.

arts.ttl: Everton vs. Liverpool postponed: When could Merseyside derby be played after Storm Darragh?
arts.sum: Everton and Liverpool's Premier League Merseyside derby is postponed due to Storm Darragh.

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool called off as Storm Darragh batters Merseyside
arts.sum: The final derby at Goodison Park has been postponed due to inclement weather

arts.ttl: Everton vs Liverpool Merseyside Derby Postponed
arts.sum: The Merseyside Derby between Everton and Liverpool has been postponed due to safety concerns as a result of Storm Darragh

arts.ttl: BREAKING: Everton vs Liverpool Merseyside Derby CALLED OFF due to Storm Darragh chaos
arts.sum: The final Merseyside derby at Goodison Park has been postponed on safety grounds as Storm Darragh hits the UK hard with Everton and Liverpool now needing to find a fresh date

arts.ttl: ‘Going to get exposed’: Troy Deeney has now predicted the result of Everton vs Liverpool
